data.title: Machine Safety Specialists offering live online training on industrial & collaborative robot safety in February 2026.
data.description: In February 2026, Machine Safety Specialists, a company under Clarion Safety Systems, will conduct a live online training session focusing on updated safety regulations for industrial and collaborative robots. The event will take place in MILFORD, Pa., and is scheduled for January 28, 2026. This training aims to address the most recent safety standards and is a valuable opportunity for individuals interested in this field.

data.title: SAP meets revenue targets, reports cloud backlog growth: Total cloud revenue up 23%, ERP Suite revenue up 28%; announces €10 billion share repurchase program.
data.description: SAP announced strong financial results for FY2025, including exceeding revenue targets and operating profit expectations. Total cloud backlog grew by 22%, reaching a record €77 billion. Cloud revenue increased by 23%, with Cloud ERP Suite revenue up 28%. Total revenue saw an 8% increase. IFRS operating profit rose by 111%, and non-IFRS operating profit increased by 28%. SAP also introduced a new €10 billion share repurchase program. These results were driven in part by the strong adoption of SAP Business AI. CFO Dominik Asam highlighted strong operating profit and free cash flow performance, reflecting operational discipline and customer trust. The company is confident in its strategy for long-term value creation. The full financial results for Q4 2025 are detailed in the article.
SAP SEES 2026 NON-IFRS CLOUD REV. EU25.8B TO EU26.2B

data.title: Middle-income families feeling financial strain due to ongoing cost of living pressures, stabilizing economy. (100)
data.description: In Duluth, Georgia, a recent survey by Primerica reveals that middle-income families in the U.S. are experiencing a more stable outlook on the economy and personal finances compared to previous years. The Middle Income Financial Security Monitor™ (FSM™) survey indicates that despite ongoing cost pressures and economic uncertainty, households are adapting to financial strains with caution. The data highlights a leveling off of middle-income consumer sentiment, indicating a trend towards stability. The survey reflects the challenges faced by families in adjusting to prolonged economic volatility.

data.description: In Hong Kong on January 28, 2026, Akeso, Inc. data.title: Expion360 (XPON) shares surge 42% after hours to $1.28 on $9.6 million revenue, nearly double yearly metric improvement.
data.description: Shares of Expion360 Inc. (NASDAQ: XPON) surged 41.97% in after-hours trading, reaching $1.28, following the release of its preliminary unaudited financial results for the year ended December 31, 2025. During the regular session, XPON closed at $0.90, marking a 5.33% increase. The company reported substantial year-over-year growth, with revenue nearly doubling from $5.6 million in 2024 to $9.6 million in 2025. Gross profit also rose significantly from $1.2 million to $2.2 million. Additionally, the cash balance soared from $0.5 million to $3.0 million. Despite these positive developments, Expion360 anticipates a net loss of around $6.2 million for 2025, an improvement from the $13.5 million loss incurred in 2024. Looking ahead to 2026, Chief Executive Officer Joseph Hammer expressed optimism about the company's expansion plans. For more details, refer to the full story on benzinga.com.

data.title: Bitcoin price surge may not last long without liquidity: Data reveals key metrics for BTC growth amid breakouts.
data.description: The recent Bitcoin price surges are unable to be sustained due to a lack of adequate buying interest. Glassnode's assessment indicates that crucial metrics will play a significant role in determining the next stage of Bitcoin's price growth.

data.title: SEC clarifies tokenized securities as issuer or third-party models: blockchain format doesn't bypass securities law.
data.description: Tokenized securities in the US are now classified by regulators as either issuer-sponsored or third-party models, with the blockchain format not exempting assets from federal securities law. This definition aims to bring clarity to the emerging sector, ensuring compliance with regulations and providing a framework for the growing market of digital assets. The distinction is crucial for companies and investors navigating this space, with the guidance helping to establish a clearer understanding of the regulatory environment. This move underscores the importance of adherence to securities laws in the rapidly expanding realm of tokenized assets, indicating a shift towards more formalized structures in the digital securities market.
